mapper.insert: insert into sb_work_group_user (group_id, user_id, customer_id, create_by, create_time, del_flag) values (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{customerId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), ifnull(#{delFlag}, '0'))
mapper.select: select user_id from sb_work_group_user where group_id = #{groupId} and ifnull(del_flag, '0') = '0'
select group_id from sb_work_group_user where user_id = #{userId} and (customer_id = #{customerId} or #{customerId} is null) and ifnull(del_flag, '0') = '0'
mapper.update: update sb_work_group_user set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate(), del_flag = '1' where group_id = #{groupId} and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(del_flag, '0') = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from sb_work_group_user where group_id = #{groupId} and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(del_flag, '0') = '0'
